name: Basic French Omelet
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil over high heat in a skillet with a rounded bottom and sloping sides.
2. In a mixing bowl, whip the egg whites, water, salt, and black pepper together using a fork until combined.
3. Pour the egg mixture into the heated skillet.
4. Cook over moderately high heat until the bottom is set.
5. Using a heatproof spatula, gently move the cooked portion of the omelet to the center of the pan, allowing the uncooked portion to flow underneath.
6. Continue cooking until the omelet is barely brown on the bottom and soft and moist in the center.
7. Spoon the filling down the center of the omelet (see note).
8. Using a spatula, carefully fold one third of the omelet over to the center.
9. Holding the skillet with one hand, use a heated serving plate in the other to tilt the omelet onto the plate.
